note: only the frontmatter description is in context at index time

when: Phase 0 — decomposition of a fresh question
note: grading and output references are not needed before retrieval exists

when: Phase 0 — a deep-research-report.md exists in the invocation CWD
note: the CWD report is read ONLY after scripts/verify_gates.py check-report-hash returns PASS
output structure + JSON schemas load at first need
thresholds load at the gate phase, not earlier

when: any phase — uncertainty about a forbidden behavior
note: anti-patterns are consulted on doubt, not preloaded

when: first-ever Phase-0 plan composition in a session
Phase 6 — after writing the four artifacts
note: runs scripts/verify_gates.py check-artifacts via Bash and quotes the JSON verdict; no additional reference reads
tier policy loads only when a tier decision is in play; a plain standard run never reads it
